title: Amtech S1860 10W Glue Gun
features: EASY TO USE: This lightweight 50W hot glue gun has a pistol grip for easy handling and has a long, 90cm cord
2 GLUE STICKS INCLUDED: Supplied with two 7.5mm glue sticks, it has a melting temperature of approximately 90°C
APPLICATIONS: It is ideal for arts and crafts activities as well as general household repairs
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer Amtech 10W Glue Gun Best choice for all DIY Lovers If you want to decorate your kid’s bedroom or to organize a party, then this is the glue gun for you. Powered by British Standard approved 3 pins fitted plug at the backside of the gun with 90cm mains cord and is supplied with 2 glue sticks and a wire stand. This mini glue gun can be used for wide applications like decorating the house, arts and crafts, repairing damaged shoes or other items, and occasional woodworking activities. This high-quality gun oozes out the glue smooth and fast Melted glue has a strong viscosity to ensure that it sticks. Note: Do not pull out the glue stick after using it every time from the back of the gun. Insert the new one to push the partially used glue stick. Benefits Quick heating 2 glue sticks Wire stand Safe and easy to use High Quality Wide usage
